expression:
/*
 HYPOTHESIS: Comparatively higher liabilities may indicate that the company has higher leverage and may have higher returns in the future.
 
 IMPLEMENTATION: Compare liabilities among companies using the fundamental data field "liabilities".
 
 HINT TO IMPROVE THE ALPHA: Different companies have different scale of assets. Can performing a ratio analysis comparison by normalizing the liability with company assets improve Alpha performance?
 */
 
 liabilities

subtract(0, rank(group_neutralize(rank(multiply(divide(ts_delta(close, 5), close), ts_sum(volume, 20))), sector) + ts_corr(rank(ts_decay_linear(multiply(close, volume), 10)), rank(implied_volatility_call_60), 5)))
